name: rightside-chat-rtl
description: Workspace LTR/RTL preference, status bar toggle, and optional chat CSS (clipboard or explicit workbench sync — see warnings).

rightSide.chatTextDirection.description: Preferred text direction for Agent chat (workspace). With autoSyncWorkbenchOnDirectionChange (default on), direction commands also sync CSS to workbench.html.

rightSide.workbenchStyleInjection.description: Deprecated. No longer used; automatic workbench edits are disabled to avoid Cursor integrity warnings. Use commands instead.

rightSide.autoReloadAfterWorkbenchWrite.description: After a successful workbench.html write, offer or perform a window reload (see confirmBeforeReloadWindow).

rightSide.confirmBeforeReloadWindow.description: When autoReloadAfterWorkbenchWrite is true, show a modal confirmation before Reload Window. Set false to reload immediately with no prompt.

rightSide.autoSyncWorkbenchOnDirectionCh.description: When true, every direction change (status bar, tree toggle, or Set LTR/RTL commands) also syncs workbench.html like “Apply styles” — without the extra confirm dialog. May trigger Cursor integrity warnings; turn off to only save the workspace setting.

commands.title: RightSide: Toggle Chat Text Direction (LTR ↔ RTL)
RightSide: Set Chat Text Direction — LTR
RightSide: Set Chat Text Direction — RTL
RightSide: Copy Chat Direction CSS to Clipboard (recommended)
RightSide: Sync Chat Styles to workbench.html (risky — may trigger corrupt-install warning)
RightSide: Remove Injected Styles from workbench.html
RightSide: Restore workbench.html from RightSide Backup (fix corrupt install)
RightSide: Re-apply Workbench Chat Styles (alias of Sync — risky)
